function.name: ask_user
function.description: Show an interactive question bubble in the chat to gather structured information from the user. Each question has clickable option buttons; the last option is always rendered as a free-text input field. You can include multiple questions — the user must answer each one before advancing to the next. Use this instead of ask-me-anything plain text when you need a specific, structured answer before proceeding.

questions.description: Ordered list of questions. The user answers them one by one.

question.description: The question text to display to the user.

options.description: Answer choices. All entries except the last are shown as clickable buttons. The last entry label is used as the placeholder hint for a free-text input field, allowing the user to type any custom answer.
